name: 01_분봉음봉시가돌파(10,30)
python_code:
IsGapUp = (DayOpen() >= PreDayClose())

Mark10 = (time >= 91000) & (time.shift(1) < 91000)
Mark30 = (time >= 93000) & (time.shift(1) < 93000)

# 09:10/30 시점에 완성된 봉이 음봉인지 확정 (ValueWhen 1, Mark, DayOpen > C)
Is10MinNeg = pd.Series(np.where(Mark10, DayOpen() > df['close'], np.nan), index=df.index).ffill()
Is30MinNeg = pd.Series(np.where(Mark30, DayOpen() > df['close'], np.nan), index=df.index).ffill()

# 음봉 확정 상태(True)에서 현재가(C)가 시가(DayOpen)를 돌파할 때 포착
Cond10 = IsGapUp & (Is10MinNeg == 1.0) & (time >= 91000) & (df['close'].shift(1) <= DayOpen()) & (df['close'] > DayOpen())
Cond30 = IsGapUp & (Is30MinNeg == 1.0) & (time >= 93000) & (df['close'].shift(1) <= DayOpen()) & (df['close'] > DayOpen())

cond = Cond10 | Cond30
